stemHtml: An aircraft above the transition level is descending. When may the crew change the altimeter from 1013.2 hPa to QNH?

options.a: After approach clearance is issued, provided level flight above the transition altitude is not indicated or anticipated.
options.b: Flight above the transition level using QNH is never permitted.
options.c: When atmospheric pressure differs significantly from standard and level flight above the TA is not anticipated.
options.d: Only if specified in Item 18 of the flight plan.
